title: Guettarda shaferi
taxonomy: Guettarda shaferi is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Guettarda, which consists of tropical plants. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the madder or coffee family. Guettarda shaferi is native to the Caribbean, specifically the island of Hispaniola. The classification of Guettarda shaferi reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Rubiaceae family.

intro: Guettarda shaferi is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the velvet tree or velvet guettarda, due to its soft, velvety leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits of reducing fever and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Guettarda shaferi include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
